response.original_title: Ghost to the Future: The Grime Machine
response.overview: Grimy Ghost! is here to guide you on a found footage time traveling feature length video journey through this evil imperialist empire we call America! Compiled from a decaying mountain of abandoned media, GHOST TO THE FUTURE: THE GRIME MACHINE arrives desperate for you to inject its creepy clips straight into your delicious hearts! Quiver in fear as God herself rips your eyelids off and forces you to watch Satan's favorite video game moments! Quake with arousal as you drown in elderly sexual VHS ephemera! One thing's for sure – after seeing GHOST TO THE FUTURE: THE GRIME MACHINE you will never be the same!
response.title: Ghost to the Future: The Grime Machine
